text: Hello. These changes are not mine. They are made in all ports. In this connection: "- Remove always-true/false conditions after FreeBSD 9, 10.1, 10.2 EOL. Approved by: portmgr blanket". Look at: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/databases/sqlite3/Makefile?r1=429442&r2=430947
